Yu-Gi-Oh! Progression

Prog with the Bois

Home Terms Privacy

Legal

Terms of Service

Last updated: April 1, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Prog with the Bois, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

2. About the Site

Prog with the Bois is a fan-made Yu-Gi-Oh! progression hub that displays weekly results, decklists, binder information, and related media for entertainment and informational purposes.

3. Permitted Use

You may use the site for personal, non-commercial viewing and browsing.

You agree not to:

  • abuse, disrupt, or interfere with the site or its services;
  • attempt unauthorized access to admin, bot, or editing features;
  • copy, scrape, or redistribute site content in a harmful or unlawful way;
  • use the site in violation of applicable law.

4. User Content and Submissions

If you submit information, feedback, or other material, you confirm that you have the right to share it. You remain responsible for what you provide.

5. Third-Party Services

The site may link to or integrate with third-party services such as Discord, Cloudflare, or external video/content platforms. Those services operate under their own terms and policies, and we are not responsible for their content or behavior.

6. Intellectual Property

Site-specific layout, text, and custom presentation belong to the site owner unless otherwise stated. Yu-Gi-Oh! names, cards, artwork, and related materials belong to their respective owners.

7. Availability

We may update, change, suspend, or remove any part of the site at any time without notice. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability.

8. Disclaimer

The site is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis without warranties of any kind, to the fullest extent permitted by law.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from use of the site.

10. Changes to These Terms

These Terms may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the site after changes are posted means you accept the revised Terms.

11. Contact

For questions about these Terms, contact the site owner through the project’s official channels.
